title: Wera 165 i PZ Kraftform Plus Lasertip VDE Insulated Screwdriver, Pozidriv 2 x 100 mm, 05006164001
features: • Insulated VDE blades for secure work at 1,000 volts
• Hard gripping zones for high working speeds, soft zones for high torque transfer.
• Handle markings for simplified finding and sorting of the tools
description: From the manufacturer Kraftform Plus 100 Series VDE Screwdrivers Wera Kraftform Plus VDE screwdrivers undergo a dielectric strength test under a 10,000-volt load in a water bath to reassure users that their screwdrivers have been exhaustively tested for their most important feature; their insulation. Each individual Wera VDE screwdriver is subjected to this test to ensure safe working up to 1,000 volts in accordance with EN 60900:2012. Wera's famous ergonomic Kraftform handle. Like no other, the Kraftform handle is shaped to perfectly fit the hand for the best possible screwdriving experience. The multi-component design features hard zones for rapid working speeds and also softer gripping zones that provides high torque transfer and extreme comfort during intensive use. Wera's Kraftform handle - makes blisters and calluses a thing of the past. Lasertip anti-cam out technology "bites" into the screw head creating a perfect fit, preventing any slipping out of the recess and reducing the contact pressure required when working. Lasertip makes screwdriving safer and easier. Take it easy tool finder at the base of the handle uses colour coding in accordance to profile and size, for fast and easy selection of the required tool. High quality "bit material" blade ensures extreme wear resistance and a long service life of the tool. Features VDE Tool Wera Kraftform Plus VDE screwdrivers undergo a dielectric strength test under a 10,000-volt load in a water bath to reassure users that their screwdrivers have been exhaustively tested for their most important feature; their insulation. Each individual Wera VDE screwdriver is subjected to this test to ensure safe working up to 1,000 volts in accordance with EN 60900:2012. Ergonomic Handle The multi-component design features hard zones for rapid working speeds and also softer gripping zones that provides high torque transfer and extreme comfort during intensive use. Lasertip Technology Lasertip anti-cam out technology "bites" into the screw head creating a perfect fit, preventing any slipping out of the recess and reducing the contact pressure required when working. Take It Easy Take it easy tool finder at the base of the handle uses colour coding in accordance to profile and size, for fast and easy selection of the required tool. Wera Tool Rebels Our mission is to challenge the standard - develop tools that transform ordinary, traditional ideas into ground breaking innovations that make the user's work easier, faster and safer.
